referencedDocs.raw:
# Blackbird Platform Product Lifecycle Skill System

## 1. Muc tieu

Tai lieu nay dinh nghia bo guideline dang skill de moi app moi, moi phase moi, va moi quyet dinh san pham deu align voi `blackbirdzzzz.art` nhu mot platform, khong phai mot tap hop standalone app.

No dung de:

- thong nhat cach team research, phan tich, phan bien, chot scope, chot architecture, theo doi delivery, va de xuat cai tien
- dam bao moi artifact deu noi mach voi `Shared Business Platform`, `Shared Product Shell`, va `App Runtime`
- bien tri thuc noi bo thanh `briefing packet` co the reuse cho con nguoi va agent

## 2. Nguyen tac nen tang khong duoc vi pham

Tat ca skill trong he nay deu phai obey cac nguyen tac sau:

1. Blackbird la platform ecosystem, khong phai mot app don le.
2. Platform-first ve business infrastructure, app-first ve business runtime.
3. Workspace la root cua ownership.
4. Shared Product Shell la UI foundation dung chung cho toan he sinh thai.
5. App moi phai integrate vao platform contracts, khong tu tao auth, workspace, billing, entitlement, connector lifecycle rieng.
6. Reuse engineering patterns tu app reference duoc phep, nhung khong duoc copy app-specific business boundaries len platform.
7. Build sau khi da co evidence. Discovery va BA phai den truoc implementation.
8. Moi artifact phai tra loi ro capability nay nam o `platform`, `shared shell`, hay `app runtime`.
9. Moi phase phai co measurable exit criteria.
10. Moi quyet dinh lon phai co path tiep theo cho iteration, khong chot tai lieu de roi do.

## 3. 3 lop phan loai bat buoc

Moi skill, moi tai lieu, moi backlog item deu phai tag ro vao 1 trong 3 lop sau:

- `Shared Business Platform`
- `Shared Product Shell`
- `App Runtime`

Neu mot item cham vao nhieu lop, phai tach:

- business ownership
- integration contract
- UI shell impact
- runtime implementation impact

## 4. Artifact chain mac dinh

Moi initiative nen di theo artifact chain sau:

1. `Market Research`
2. `BA Problem Brief`
3. `Critical Review`
4. `Phase BRD`
5. `Platform Architecture + Design Alignment`
6. `User Stories`
7. `Checkpoint Dashboard Plan`
8. `Implementation`
9. `Improvement Loop`

Artifact sau phai reference artifact truoc. Khong duoc jump tu idea sang code ma khong co chain toi thieu tu `research -> BA -> phase BRD -> architecture -> stories`.

Khi capability da ship va da co production evidence that, chain nay duoc vao qua `blackbird-production-phase-loop`.
Skill do se so huu `observe -> checkpoint -> route -> re-validation`, sau do chi handoff vao artifact chain generic neu route la `new-phase`.

## 5. Ky luat chung cho moi skill

Moi skill trong bo nay phai produce 5 nhom thong tin:

1. `Decision`
2. `Evidence`
3. `Boundary`
4. `Delivery`
5. `Metrics`

Noi cu the:

- `Decision`: dang quyet cai gi, khong phai dang viet tai lieu cho vui
- `Evidence`: du lieu, interview, benchmark, analytics, policy, hoac assumption can test
- `Boundary`: phan nao vao platform, shell, app runtime
- `Delivery`: artifact tiep theo la gi, ai su dung, dependency nao can co
- `Metrics`: se do thanh cong bang cach nao

## 6. Quality gates theo tung giai doan

### 6.1. Market Research gate

Chi duoc qua gate neu da co:

- user/problem segment ro rang
- alternatives/competitors/substitutes duoc map
- evidence table ro nguon
- top assumptions va unknowns duoc rank
- nhan dinh so bo capability do co xu huong vao platform hay app

### 6.2. BA gate

Chi duoc qua gate neu da co:

- problem statement, desired outcome, va scope boundary
- stakeholder map
- current state va future state
- requirement split theo 3 lop: platform, shell, app runtime
- constraints, dependencies, non-goals

### 6.3. Critical Review gate

Chi duoc qua gate neu da co:

- top risks ranked by impact x probability
- hidden assumptions
- strongest case against
- tripwires/canh bao som
- recommendation: proceed, proceed with modifications, pause, hoac rethink

### 6.4. Phase BRD gate

Chi duoc qua gate neu da co:

- phase objective
- in-scope/out-of-scope
- KPI/KR cho phase
- business rules da chot
- exit criteria va release readiness rules

### 6.5. Architecture + Design gate

Chi duoc qua gate neu da co:

- service boundary ro
- integration contract voi platform
- ownership cua data va workflows
- shared shell/design token impact
- operability, security, reliability, cost, observability considerations

### 6.6. User Story gate

Chi duoc qua gate neu da co:

- actor, goal, reason ro rang
- acceptance criteria testable
- layer tag: platform/shell/app
- dependencies va evidence links
- story du nho de delivery

### 6.7. Delivery Control gate

Chi duoc qua gate neu da co:

- checkpoints co owner, due window, dependency
- trang thai dashboard duoc dinh nghia ro
- artifacts linked vao checkpoint
- risk va blocker route ro
- progress duoc visual hoa theo gia tri, khong chi theo task count

### 6.8. Improvement gate

Chi duoc qua gate neu da co:

- baseline truoc thay doi
- ket qua sau thay doi
- phan tich business + user + engineering metrics
- de xuat tiep theo co priority
- quyet dinh giu, sua, bo, hay mo rong

## 7. Metrics framework chung

Khong duoc quan ly phase chi bang velocity.

Moi san pham/phase nen co toi thieu 3 tang metrics:

- `Business`: activation, revenue, retention, entitlement adoption, workspace expansion
- `User`: task success, time-to-value, error rate, satisfaction proxy, support pain points
- `Engineering`: DORA-style throughput/instability, reliability, incident recovery, observability

Neu la UI hoac experience-level capability, them `HEART`-style nhom metrics:

- Happiness
- Engagement
- Adoption
- Retention
- Task success

## 8. Cau hoi boundary bat buoc

Moi skill phai tra loi 8 cau hoi sau:

1. Van de nay co that su la domain dung chung cua nhieu app khong?
2. Gia tri do nam o `who can use what` hay `how work gets done`?
3. Ownership root co quay ve workspace khong?
4. Co anh huong toi billing, entitlement, connector state, governance khong?
5. Co can shared shell pattern hay chi la domain widget cua app?
6. Capability nay co the song nhu app runtime rieng duoc khong?
7. Neu dua len platform, platform co bi keo theo app-specific runtime khong?
8. Metrics nao chung minh quyet dinh nay dung?

## 9. Bo skill duoc de xuat

### A. `blackbird-playbook`

Entry point cho nguoi dung muon he thong tu de xuat va dieu phoi cac skill con theo dung lifecycle.

### B. `blackbird-platform-lifecycle-core`

Dieu phoi toan bo chain. Dung khi setup initiative moi, app moi, phase moi.

### C. `blackbird-market-research`

Dung cho market research, competitor scan, substitute scan, user/problem discovery.

### D. `blackbird-business-analysis`

Dung cho BA problem framing, stakeholder/constraint mapping, requirement split.

### E. `blackbird-critical-review`

Dung cho pre-mortem, devil's advocate, assumption mapping, stress test.

### F. `blackbird-user-stories`

Dung cho user story va acceptance criteria theo layer.

### G. `blackbird-phase-brd`

Dung de chot BRD cho mot phase cu the.

### H. `blackbird-platform-architecture`

Dung de chot service boundary, integration contract, va design system alignment.

### I. `blackbird-delivery-control`

Dung de break checkpoint, dua len dashboard, va control dependency/risk.

### J. `blackbird-improvement-loop`

Dung de phan tich sau release, sau phase, hoac trong live ops de de xuat cai tien.

### K. `blackbird-production-phase-loop`

Dung cho live production iteration khi da co run / release / artifact production that.
Skill nay la specialization cua lifecycle cho `observe -> checkpoint -> route -> re-validation`.
No khong thay `blackbird-platform-lifecycle-core`; no chi handoff vao core khi can phase moi.

## 10. Thu tu dung skill theo lifecycle

### 10.1. App moi

1. `blackbird-platform-lifecycle-core`
2. `blackbird-market-research`
3. `blackbird-business-analysis`
4. `blackbird-critical-review`
5. `blackbird-phase-brd`
6. `blackbird-platform-architecture`
7. `blackbird-user-stories`
8. `blackbird-delivery-control`
9. `blackbird-improvement-loop`

### 10.2. Feature moi trong app da co

1. `blackbird-business-analysis`
2. `blackbird-critical-review`
3. `blackbird-phase-brd`
4. `blackbird-platform-architecture` neu co tac dong boundary/shell
5. `blackbird-user-stories`
6. `blackbird-delivery-control`
7. `blackbird-improvement-loop`

### 10.3. Cai tien live product

1. `blackbird-production-phase-loop`
2. `blackbird-improvement-loop`
3. `blackbird-critical-review`
4. Route theo checkpoint:
   - `evidence-weak` -> quay lai observation / instrumentation
   - `contained-fix` -> `blackbird-delivery-control` -> implementation
   - `new-phase` -> `blackbird-platform-lifecycle-core` -> `blackbird-business-analysis` -> `blackbird-phase-brd` -> `blackbird-user-stories`

## 11. Artifact schema chung

Moi artifact nen co front matter hoac section metadata toi thieu:

```text
Title:
Owner:
Date:
Related app:
Lifecycle stage:
Primary layer: platform | shell | app
Related layers:
Upstream artifacts:
Downstream artifacts:
Decision status: draft | review | locked
```

## 12. Quy tac tai lieu va dashboard

1. Tai lieu phai version-controlled trong repo.
2. Moi phase phai co doc source of truth rieng.
3. Dashboard khong thay the tai lieu, dashboard chi la bo mat control.
4. Checkpoint nao khong link toi artifact va output thi la checkpoint yeu.
5. Status khong duoc chi la `todo/doing/done`; phai co risk, dependency, va evidence update.

## 13. Tich hop voi docs hien co cua Blackbird

Tat ca skill trong bo nay phai align voi:

- [MASTER](/Users/nguyenquocthong/project/blackbirdzzzz.art/docs/MASTER.md)
- [Platform And Design Foundation](/Users/nguyenquocthong/project/blackbirdzzzz.art/docs/blackbird-platform-and-design-foundation.md)
- [Shared Platform App Boundaries](/Users/nguyenquocthong/project/blackbirdzzzz.art/docs/blackbird-shared-platform-app-boundaries.md)
- [Dashboard Integration Rules](/Users/nguyenquocthong/project/blackbirdzzzz.art/docs/dashboard-coordinate-blackbird-integration-rules.md)

Neu conflict, thu tu uu tien:

1. `docs/MASTER.md`
2. tai lieu phase dang active
3. tai lieu nay
4. skill-specific guidance

## 14. Nguon tham khao ben ngoai

Nguon research va adaptation nam tai:

- [External Research Notes](/Users/nguyenquocthong/project/blackbirdzzzz.art/docs/skill-system/EXTERNAL_RESEARCH_NOTES.md)
- [Blackbird Playbook](/Users/nguyenquocthong/project/blackbirdzzzz.art/docs/skill-system/BLACKBIRD_PLAYBOOK.md)

---
name: blackbird-platform-lifecycle-core
description: >
  Use when the user asks to "plan a new Blackbird app", "tao app moi trong Blackbird",
  "setup lifecycle", "setup product workflow", "thiet ke quy trinh phat trien san pham",
  "bb-core", "core", "lifecycle", "khung phat trien",
  or wants end-to-end coordination across research, BA, BRD, architecture, stories,
  delivery control, and improvement for the Blackbird platform.
---


# Blackbird Platform Lifecycle Core

Doc truoc:

- `/Users/nguyenquocthong/project/blackbirdzzzz.art/docs/MASTER.md`
- `/Users/nguyenquocthong/project/blackbirdzzzz.art/docs/skill-system/BLACKBIRD_PLATFORM_PRODUCT_LIFECYCLE.md`

Vai tro:

- Day la orchestrator generic cho artifact chain va quality gates cua Blackbird.
- No khong so huu production observation, live run monitoring, hay re-validation sau deploy. Phan do thuoc `blackbird-production-phase-loop`.

Workflow:

1. Xac dinh initiative dang thuoc `platform`, `shared shell`, hay `app runtime`.
2. Xep loai maturity: app moi, feature moi, phase moi, review plan, hoac handoff tu production loop.
3. Chon skill chain toi thieu de khoa artifact chain:
   - `blackbird-market-research` khi bai toan chua du discovery
   - `blackbird-business-analysis`
   - `blackbird-critical-review`
   - `blackbird-phase-brd` neu can phase contract ro hon
   - `blackbird-platform-architecture` neu co thay doi boundary / shell / data flow
   - `blackbird-user-stories`
   - `blackbird-delivery-control`
4. Kiem tra moi artifact deu co `decision`, `evidence`, `boundary`, `delivery`, `metrics`.
5. Chot handoff sang implementation hoac tra lai `blackbird-production-phase-loop` khi can validate bang production that.

Rule:

- Khong cho phep jump tu idea sang implementation neu chua co chain toi thieu.
- Khong thay the critique bang intuition; dung `blackbird-critical-review` cho moi quyet dinh lon.
- Khong route live production observation vao skill nay.

Output bat buoc:

- lifecycle plan
- artifact map
- skill order
- quality gates
- handoff conditions

referencedDocs.raw:
# Blackbird Master Document

## 1. Muc tieu cua file nay

Day la `source of truth` cap cao nhat cho toan bo Blackbird.

Tat ca cac tai lieu khac ve:

- product direction
- platform boundaries
- phase planning
- system architecture
- app integration

deu phai phu hop voi file nay.

Neu co xung dot giua cac tai lieu, uu tien theo thu tu:

1. `docs/MASTER.md`
2. tai lieu phase hien hanh
3. tai lieu tham chieu/lich su

## 2. Blackbird la gi

Blackbird la mot he sinh thai gom:

- `Shared Business Platform`
- nhieu `Apps` hoac `Services` customer-facing

Blackbird khong duoc xem la mot san pham don le.

No la mot nen tang kinh doanh dung chung de nhieu app co the song tren do ma van giu:

- account va login thong nhat
- workspace va team thong nhat
- subscription va billing thong nhat
- app access thong nhat
- source connector state thong nhat
- governance va audit thong nhat

Song song, Blackbird nen co mot `Shared Product Shell` dung chung cho:

- workspace switcher
- app switcher
- account/settings shell
- billing/connectors/team management screens
- design tokens va visual language thong nhat

## 3. Nguyen tac chot cho toan bo san pham

### 3.1. Platform-first ve business, app-first ve runtime

Blackbird dung mo hinh:

- `platform so huu shared business infrastructure`
- `app so huu business processing runtime`

Noi ngan gon:

- platform tra loi `who can use what`
- app tra loi `how work gets done`

### 3.2. Workspace la root cua ownership

Moi tai nguyen dung chung quan trong phai quy ve `Workspace`.

Vi du:

- memberships
- subscriptions
- app access
- billing account
- connector accounts
- auth sessions
- audit events

Khong app nao duoc phep tao tenant model rieng thay cho workspace.

### 3.3. Shared platform chi giu domain co tinh on dinh cao

Platform chi nen giu nhung gi:

- duoc nhieu app dung chung
- khong bi keo boi use case rieng cua mot app
- la nen tang cho governance, commerce va ownership

### 3.4. App co quyen tu chu runtime

Moi app duoc phep tu so huu:

- workflow nghiep vu
- crawl strategy
- normalize schema
- analysis pipeline
- report/read model

Platform khong nen ep moi app theo cung processing runtime.

### 3.5. Source auth state la shared asset

Tai khoan ket noi voi Facebook hoac nen tang khac la tai san cua workspace, nen phai duoc quan ly o platform.

App khong duoc tu giu:

- connector lifecycle
- auth session lifecycle
- source credential vault

### 3.6. App access va billing phai thong nhat o platform

App nao duoc dung, goi nao da mua, thanh vien nao duoc vao app nao, va thong tin billing cua workspace:

- phai nam o platform
- khong duoc moi app quan ly lai

### 3.7. Shared Product Shell dung chung cho he sinh thai

Blackbird nen co mot lop UI foundation dung chung cho:

- design tokens
- theme system
- shared layout shell
- navigation va switchers
- generic forms/tables/dialogs/status patterns

Lop nay khong thay the app UI.

No chi giai quyet:

- visual language
- shell consistency
- common admin/settings UX

## 4. Boundary chinh thuc

## 4.1. Shared Business Platform so huu

- Identity
- Workspace and Team
- App Catalog
- Subscription and Billing
- App Access and Entitlement
- Source Connector State
- Shared Governance and Audit

## 4.2. Apps so huu

- app-specific crawl
- app-specific normalize
- app-specific analysis
- app-specific reports
- app-specific operations/jobs
- app-specific read models
- app-specific saved views/templates/workflows

## 4.3. Shared Product Shell so huu

- design tokens
- theme provider
- shared app shell
- workspace/app switchers
- generic forms/tables/dialogs/status components
- settings page patterns

## 4.4. Khong duoc lam

Khong duoc de:

- app tu auth rieng
- app tu workspace/team rieng
- app tu billing rieng
- app tu auth vault rieng

Neu can shared processing sau nay, uu tien:

- shared SDK
- shared library

truoc khi tao shared runtime service moi.

Khong nen ep Shared Product Shell so huu:

- domain widgets qua dac thu
- report layouts qua rieng cua tung app
- business runtime cua app

## 5. Shared Platform Service Catalog

### A. Identity Service

So huu:

- User
- Session

### B. Workspace and Team Service

So huu:

- Workspace
- Membership
- Role

### C. App Catalog Service

So huu:

- AppDefinition
- AppPlan

### D. Subscription and Billing Service

So huu:

- WorkspaceSubscription
- BillingAccount
- Invoice
- UsageMeter

### E. App Access and Entitlement Service

So huu:

- AppAccessGrant
- MemberAppPermission
- AppFeatureGrant

### F. Source Connector Platform

So huu:

- SourcePlatform
- ConnectorAccount
- AuthSession
- ExecutionProfile
- SourceHealthRecord

### G. Governance Service

So huu:

- AuditEvent
- AdminAction
- Notification

## 6. App Integration Contracts

Moi app khi tich hop vao Blackbird phai dung 3 contract chinh:

### 6.1. Workspace and member context contract

App phai nhan duoc:

- actor_id
- workspace_id
- membership role
- app_code

### 6.2. App access contract

Platform phai tra loi duoc:

- workspace nay co duoc dung app nay khong
- subscription/app access con hieu luc khong
- phase 1 resolve o muc workspace, khong tron vao `MemberAppPermission`

`MemberAppPermission` co the duoc query o lop gating rieng khi app can chan/mo actor cu the.

### 6.3. Connector state contract

Platform phai tra duoc:

- workspace co connector account nao
  Phase 1 gioi han `1 Facebook ConnectorAccount / workspace`
- session health cua connector ra sao
  Phase 1 dung enum `healthy | warning | expired | invalid`
- metadata nao app co the su dung de chay runtime cua no

App chi duoc `use connector state`.

App khong duoc `own connector state`.

## 7. Cach ra quyet dinh khi them domain moi

Neu mot domain moi xuat hien, dung 5 cau hoi sau:

1. Nhieu app co can dung chung no khong?
2. No co tinh on dinh cao hay se bi keo boi use case rieng?
3. No co lien quan den ownership, access, billing, governance khong?
4. Neu de trong app, co gay duplicate nguy hiem khong?
5. Neu de trong platform, co bien platform thanh bottleneck khong?

Quy tac:

- neu nghieng ve governance/business infrastructure -> de o platform
- neu nghieng ve runtime/use-case processing -> de o app

## 8. Nguyên tắc phase planning

Moi phase phai ghi ro:

- phase nay xay `platform` hay `app`
- actor chinh la ai
- tai nguyen nao la source of truth
- out of scope la gi

Khong duoc viet phase doc theo cach tron boundary giua:

- shared platform
- app-specific runtime

## 9. Shared Platform Phase 1 duoc chot

Shared Platform Phase 1 chi tap trung vao:

- account/login minimum
- workspace/team minimum, gom `owner/admin/member/billing_admin`
- app catalog
- subscription/app access skeleton
  Phase 1 chi can `WorkspaceSubscription + BillingAccount`, khong can `Invoice`
  `workspace app access` resolve theo `workspace subscription/access state`
- billing account skeleton
- Facebook connector account + auth session management
  Phase 1 gioi han `1 Facebook ConnectorAccount / workspace`
- shared governance/audit minimum

Shared Platform Phase 1 khong bao gom:

- crawl runtime
- normalize runtime
- analysis runtime
- report runtime

Nhung nang luc do thuoc `Phase 1 cua tung app`.

## 10. App Phase 1 guideline

Moi app Phase 1 co the tu xay:

- crawl service
- normalize service
- analysis service
- report service

nhung bat buoc phai tich hop voi platform cho:

- auth
- workspace context
- app access
- connector state

## 11. Tai lieu nen ton tai sau file master

Moi app/phase sau nay nen co:

- `docs/phases/{phase}/business-analysis.md`
- `docs/phases/{phase}/phase-brd.md`
- `docs/phases/{phase}/user-stories.md`
- `docs/phases/{phase}/solution-architecture.md`

Moi doc phase phai mo dau bang cach tham chieu file master nay.

Tai lieu ho tro cap du an nen co:

- [ENGINEERING_RULES.md](/Users/nguyenquocthong/project/blackbirdzzzz.art/docs/ENGINEERING_RULES.md)
- [DEPLOYMENT_AND_INFRASTRUCTURE.md](/Users/nguyenquocthong/project/blackbirdzzzz.art/docs/DEPLOYMENT_AND_INFRASTRUCTURE.md)
- [dashboard-coordinate-blackbird-integration-rules.md](/Users/nguyenquocthong/project/blackbirdzzzz.art/docs/dashboard-coordinate-blackbird-integration-rules.md)

## 12. Tinh trang cac tai lieu hien tai

### Con hieu luc

- `docs/MASTER.md`
- `docs/blackbird-shared-platform-app-boundaries.md`
- `docs/phases/phase-1/user-stories.md`

### Can xem la tai lieu tham chieu lich su

- `docs/blackbird-core-platform-architecture.md`
- `docs/blackbird-platform-service-catalog-and-domain-model.md`
- `docs/cloud-vendor-platform-patterns-for-blackbird.md`

Ly do:

- cac file nay co gia tri ve qua trinh suy nghi va benchmark
- nhung mot so boundary cu khong con la source of truth nua

## 13. Kien nghi chot

Tu thoi diem nay, moi quyet dinh kien truc va san pham nen theo mot cau hoi don gian:

`No la nang luc dung chung cua he sinh thai Blackbird, hay no la runtime nghiep vu cua mot app cu the?`

Neu tra loi duoc cau hoi do dung, ban se dat dung boundary.

referencedDocs.raw:
# Blackbird Platform Product Lifecycle Skill System

## 1. Muc tieu

Tai lieu nay dinh nghia bo guideline dang skill de moi app moi, moi phase moi, va moi quyet dinh san pham deu align voi `blackbirdzzzz.art` nhu mot platform, khong phai mot tap hop standalone app.

No dung de:

- thong nhat cach team research, phan tich, phan bien, chot scope, chot architecture, theo doi delivery, va de xuat cai tien
- dam bao moi artifact deu noi mach voi `Shared Business Platform`, `Shared Product Shell`, va `App Runtime`
- bien tri thuc noi bo thanh `briefing packet` co the reuse cho con nguoi va agent

## 2. Nguyen tac nen tang khong duoc vi pham

Tat ca skill trong he nay deu phai obey cac nguyen tac sau:

1. Blackbird la platform ecosystem, khong phai mot app don le.
2. Platform-first ve business infrastructure, app-first ve business runtime.
3. Workspace la root cua ownership.
4. Shared Product Shell la UI foundation dung chung cho toan he sinh thai.
5. App moi phai integrate vao platform contracts, khong tu tao auth, workspace, billing, entitlement, connector lifecycle rieng.
6. Reuse engineering patterns tu app reference duoc phep, nhung khong duoc copy app-specific business boundaries len platform.
7. Build sau khi da co evidence. Discovery va BA phai den truoc implementation.
8. Moi artifact phai tra loi ro capability nay nam o `platform`, `shared shell`, hay `app runtime`.
9. Moi phase phai co measurable exit criteria.
10. Moi quyet dinh lon phai co path tiep theo cho iteration, khong chot tai lieu de roi do.

## 3. 3 lop phan loai bat buoc

Moi skill, moi tai lieu, moi backlog item deu phai tag ro vao 1 trong 3 lop sau:

- `Shared Business Platform`
- `Shared Product Shell`
- `App Runtime`

Neu mot item cham vao nhieu lop, phai tach:

- business ownership
- integration contract
- UI shell impact
- runtime implementation impact

## 4. Artifact chain mac dinh

Moi initiative nen di theo artifact chain sau:

1. `Market Research`
2. `BA Problem Brief`
3. `Critical Review`
4. `Phase BRD`
5. `Platform Architecture + Design Alignment`
6. `User Stories`
7. `Checkpoint Dashboard Plan`
8. `Implementation`
9. `Improvement Loop`

Artifact sau phai reference artifact truoc. Khong duoc jump tu idea sang code ma khong co chain toi thieu tu `research -> BA -> phase BRD -> architecture -> stories`.

Khi capability da ship va da co production evidence that, chain nay duoc vao qua `blackbird-production-phase-loop`.
Skill do se so huu `observe -> checkpoint -> route -> re-validation`, sau do chi handoff vao artifact chain generic neu route la `new-phase`.

## 5. Ky luat chung cho moi skill

Moi skill trong bo nay phai produce 5 nhom thong tin:

1. `Decision`
2. `Evidence`
3. `Boundary`
4. `Delivery`
5. `Metrics`

Noi cu the:

- `Decision`: dang quyet cai gi, khong phai dang viet tai lieu cho vui
- `Evidence`: du lieu, interview, benchmark, analytics, policy, hoac assumption can test
- `Boundary`: phan nao vao platform, shell, app runtime
- `Delivery`: artifact tiep theo la gi, ai su dung, dependency nao can co
- `Metrics`: se do thanh cong bang cach nao

## 6. Quality gates theo tung giai doan

### 6.1. Market Research gate

Chi duoc qua gate neu da co:

- user/problem segment ro rang
- alternatives/competitors/substitutes duoc map
- evidence table ro nguon
- top assumptions va unknowns duoc rank
- nhan dinh so bo capability do co xu huong vao platform hay app

### 6.2. BA gate

Chi duoc qua gate neu da co:

- problem statement, desired outcome, va scope boundary
- stakeholder map
- current state va future state
- requirement split theo 3 lop: platform, shell, app runtime
- constraints, dependencies, non-goals

### 6.3. Critical Review gate

Chi duoc qua gate neu da co:

- top risks ranked by impact x probability
- hidden assumptions
- strongest case against
- tripwires/canh bao som
- recommendation: proceed, proceed with modifications, pause, hoac rethink

### 6.4. Phase BRD gate

Chi duoc qua gate neu da co:

- phase objective
- in-scope/out-of-scope
- KPI/KR cho phase
- business rules da chot
- exit criteria va release readiness rules

### 6.5. Architecture + Design gate

Chi duoc qua gate neu da co:

- service boundary ro
- integration contract voi platform
- ownership cua data va workflows
- shared shell/design token impact
- operability, security, reliability, cost, observability considerations

### 6.6. User Story gate

Chi duoc qua gate neu da co:

- actor, goal, reason ro rang
- acceptance criteria testable
- layer tag: platform/shell/app
- dependencies va evidence links
- story du nho de delivery

### 6.7. Delivery Control gate

Chi duoc qua gate neu da co:

- checkpoints co owner, due window, dependency
- trang thai dashboard duoc dinh nghia ro
- artifacts linked vao checkpoint
- risk va blocker route ro
- progress duoc visual hoa theo gia tri, khong chi theo task count

### 6.8. Improvement gate

Chi duoc qua gate neu da co:

- baseline truoc thay doi
- ket qua sau thay doi
- phan tich business + user + engineering metrics
- de xuat tiep theo co priority
- quyet dinh giu, sua, bo, hay mo rong

## 7. Metrics framework chung

Khong duoc quan ly phase chi bang velocity.

Moi san pham/phase nen co toi thieu 3 tang metrics:

- `Business`: activation, revenue, retention, entitlement adoption, workspace expansion
- `User`: task success, time-to-value, error rate, satisfaction proxy, support pain points
- `Engineering`: DORA-style throughput/instability, reliability, incident recovery, observability

Neu la UI hoac experience-level capability, them `HEART`-style nhom metrics:

- Happiness
- Engagement
- Adoption
- Retention
- Task success

## 8. Cau hoi boundary bat buoc

Moi skill phai tra loi 8 cau hoi sau:

1. Van de nay co that su la domain dung chung cua nhieu app khong?
2. Gia tri do nam o `who can use what` hay `how work gets done`?
3. Ownership root co quay ve workspace khong?
4. Co anh huong toi billing, entitlement, connector state, governance khong?
5. Co can shared shell pattern hay chi la domain widget cua app?
6. Capability nay co the song nhu app runtime rieng duoc khong?
7. Neu dua len platform, platform co bi keo theo app-specific runtime khong?
8. Metrics nao chung minh quyet dinh nay dung?

## 9. Bo skill duoc de xuat

### A. `blackbird-playbook`

Entry point cho nguoi dung muon he thong tu de xuat va dieu phoi cac skill con theo dung lifecycle.

### B. `blackbird-platform-lifecycle-core`

Dieu phoi toan bo chain. Dung khi setup initiative moi, app moi, phase moi.

### C. `blackbird-market-research`

Dung cho market research, competitor scan, substitute scan, user/problem discovery.

### D. `blackbird-business-analysis`

Dung cho BA problem framing, stakeholder/constraint mapping, requirement split.

### E. `blackbird-critical-review`

Dung cho pre-mortem, devil's advocate, assumption mapping, stress test.

### F. `blackbird-user-stories`

Dung cho user story va acceptance criteria theo layer.

### G. `blackbird-phase-brd`

Dung de chot BRD cho mot phase cu the.

### H. `blackbird-platform-architecture`

Dung de chot service boundary, integration contract, va design system alignment.

### I. `blackbird-delivery-control`

Dung de break checkpoint, dua len dashboard, va control dependency/risk.

### J. `blackbird-improvement-loop`

Dung de phan tich sau release, sau phase, hoac trong live ops de de xuat cai tien.

### K. `blackbird-production-phase-loop`

Dung cho live production iteration khi da co run / release / artifact production that.
Skill nay la specialization cua lifecycle cho `observe -> checkpoint -> route -> re-validation`.
No khong thay `blackbird-platform-lifecycle-core`; no chi handoff vao core khi can phase moi.

## 10. Thu tu dung skill theo lifecycle

### 10.1. App moi

1. `blackbird-platform-lifecycle-core`
2. `blackbird-market-research`
3. `blackbird-business-analysis`
4. `blackbird-critical-review`
5. `blackbird-phase-brd`
6. `blackbird-platform-architecture`
7. `blackbird-user-stories`
8. `blackbird-delivery-control`
9. `blackbird-improvement-loop`

### 10.2. Feature moi trong app da co

1. `blackbird-business-analysis`
2. `blackbird-critical-review`
3. `blackbird-phase-brd`
4. `blackbird-platform-architecture` neu co tac dong boundary/shell
5. `blackbird-user-stories`
6. `blackbird-delivery-control`
7. `blackbird-improvement-loop`

### 10.3. Cai tien live product

1. `blackbird-production-phase-loop`
2. `blackbird-improvement-loop`
3. `blackbird-critical-review`
4. Route theo checkpoint:
   - `evidence-weak` -> quay lai observation / instrumentation
   - `contained-fix` -> `blackbird-delivery-control` -> implementation
   - `new-phase` -> `blackbird-platform-lifecycle-core` -> `blackbird-business-analysis` -> `blackbird-phase-brd` -> `blackbird-user-stories`

## 11. Artifact schema chung

Moi artifact nen co front matter hoac section metadata toi thieu:

```text
Title:
Owner:
Date:
Related app:
Lifecycle stage:
Primary layer: platform | shell | app
Related layers:
Upstream artifacts:
Downstream artifacts:
Decision status: draft | review | locked
```

## 12. Quy tac tai lieu va dashboard

1. Tai lieu phai version-controlled trong repo.
2. Moi phase phai co doc source of truth rieng.
3. Dashboard khong thay the tai lieu, dashboard chi la bo mat control.
4. Checkpoint nao khong link toi artifact va output thi la checkpoint yeu.
5. Status khong duoc chi la `todo/doing/done`; phai co risk, dependency, va evidence update.

## 13. Tich hop voi docs hien co cua Blackbird

Tat ca skill trong bo nay phai align voi:

- [MASTER](/Users/nguyenquocthong/project/blackbirdzzzz.art/docs/MASTER.md)
- [Platform And Design Foundation](/Users/nguyenquocthong/project/blackbirdzzzz.art/docs/blackbird-platform-and-design-foundation.md)
- [Shared Platform App Boundaries](/Users/nguyenquocthong/project/blackbirdzzzz.art/docs/blackbird-shared-platform-app-boundaries.md)
- [Dashboard Integration Rules](/Users/nguyenquocthong/project/blackbirdzzzz.art/docs/dashboard-coordinate-blackbird-integration-rules.md)

Neu conflict, thu tu uu tien:

1. `docs/MASTER.md`
2. tai lieu phase dang active
3. tai lieu nay
4. skill-specific guidance

## 14. Nguon tham khao ben ngoai

Nguon research va adaptation nam tai:

- [External Research Notes](/Users/nguyenquocthong/project/blackbirdzzzz.art/docs/skill-system/EXTERNAL_RESEARCH_NOTES.md)
- [Blackbird Playbook](/Users/nguyenquocthong/project/blackbirdzzzz.art/docs/skill-system/BLACKBIRD_PLAYBOOK.md)

referencedDocs.raw:
# Blackbird Playbook

## 1. Muc tieu

`blackbird-playbook` la entrypoint de nguoi dung khong can nho toan bo skill chain ngay tu dau.

No khong thay the cac skill con.

No co nhiem vu:

- nhan dien loai bai toan
- chon orchestrator dung
- xep thu tu artifact
- nhac cac gate bat buoc
- giu toan bo quyet dinh align voi `platform / shared shell / app runtime`

## 2. Kien truc route

`blackbird-playbook` khong di thang vao leaf skills ngay tu dau.

No route vao 1 trong 2 orchestrator:

1. `blackbird-platform-lifecycle-core`
   Dung cho app moi, pre-live feature/phase, review plan, hoac moi bai toan chua co production evidence that.
2. `blackbird-production-phase-loop`
   Dung cho bai toan da co run / release / artifact production that va can iterate tu production truth.

Sau khi chon orchestrator, moi tiep tuc chon child skill chain toi thieu.

## 3. Khi nao dung playbook

Dung `blackbird-playbook` khi:

- ban bat dau 1 app moi trong Blackbird
- ban chua chac nen goi skill nao truoc
- ban muon 1 route mac dinh de di tu idea -> docs -> delivery
- ban muon review 1 phase xem dang thieu artifact nao
- ban muon chuyen tu production run that sang phase tiep theo ma khong bi nhay coc

## 4. Playbook se auto dieu phoi nhu the nao

### A. App moi

1. `blackbird-platform-lifecycle-core`
2. `blackbird-market-research`
3. `blackbird-business-analysis`
4. `blackbird-critical-review`
5. `blackbird-phase-brd`
6. `blackbird-platform-architecture`
7. `blackbird-user-stories`
8. `blackbird-delivery-control`

### B. Feature moi trong app da co, chua co production evidence

1. `blackbird-platform-lifecycle-core`
2. `blackbird-business-analysis`
3. `blackbird-critical-review`
4. `blackbird-phase-brd` neu scope khac rong
5. `blackbird-platform-architecture` neu cham boundary / shell
6. `blackbird-user-stories`
7. `blackbird-delivery-control`

### C. Review plan truoc khi code

1. `blackbird-platform-lifecycle-core`
2. `blackbird-critical-review`
3. `blackbird-phase-brd` neu scope chua khoa
4. `blackbird-platform-architecture` neu ownership chua ro

### D. Live production iteration

1. `blackbird-production-phase-loop`
2. `blackbird-improvement-loop`
3. `blackbird-critical-review`
4. Route tiep theo:
   - `contained-fix` -> `blackbird-delivery-control`
   - `new-phase` -> `blackbird-platform-lifecycle-core`

## 5. Rule dieu phoi

Playbook phai obey 7 rule:

1. Khong nhay sang story neu problem chua frame ro.
2. Khong nhay sang architecture neu BRD phase chua khoa.
3. Khong nhay sang implementation neu checkpoint plan chua ro.
4. Neu boundary mo ho, uu tien orchestrator + critical review truoc.
5. Neu la app moi, bat buoc di qua research.
6. Neu da ship roi, improvement phai dua tren baseline va metrics that.
7. Neu da co production evidence, uu tien `blackbird-production-phase-loop` thay vi route generic.

## 6. Cach ban goi playbook

### Prompt ngan

- `Dung bb-playbook cho initiative nay`
- `Dung playbook de chi toi nen dung skill nao truoc`
- `Dung bb-playbook de setup artifact chain cho phase 7`

### Prompt ro hon

- `Dung bb-playbook cho app moi nay. Toi muon biet skill nao truoc, artifact nao can co, va gate nao bat buoc.`
- `Dung bb-playbook cho feature nay trong dashboard-coordinate. Nho split ro platform, shell, app runtime.`
- `Dung bb-playbook cho production run nay. Toi muon route dung cho contained fix hay new phase.`

## 7. Output mong doi tu playbook

Khi dung playbook, output nen co:

- loai bai toan
- boundary conclusion so bo
- route decision
- orchestrator next
- recommended skill chain
- required artifacts
- stop rules
- autonomy note
- next prompt de goi skill tiep theo

## 8. Alias

- `bb-playbook`
- `playbook`

## 9. Doc lien quan

- [Lifecycle Skill System](/Users/nguyenquocthong/project/blackbirdzzzz.art/docs/skill-system/BLACKBIRD_PLATFORM_PRODUCT_LIFECYCLE.md)
- [Quickstart Aliases](/Users/nguyenquocthong/project/blackbirdzzzz.art/docs/skill-system/QUICKSTART_ALIASES.md)

referencedDocs.raw:
# Blackbird Skill Quickstart And Aliases

## 1. Muc tieu

Tai lieu nay giup dung bo skill Blackbird bang alias ngan, de nho, va de go trong chat.

## 2. Bang alias

| Alias de go | Skill that su | Dung khi nao |
|---|---|---|
| `bb-playbook` | `blackbird-playbook` | Khong chac dung skill nao truoc; muon auto dieu phoi skill chain |
| `bb-core` | `blackbird-platform-lifecycle-core` | Bat dau app moi, phase moi, hoac can setup full workflow |
| `bb-research` | `blackbird-market-research` | Nghien cuu thi truong, doi thu, substitute, discovery |
| `bb-ba` | `blackbird-business-analysis` | Problem framing, stakeholder, requirement split |
| `bb-challenge` | `blackbird-critical-review` | Phan bien, pre-mortem, stress test, assumptions |
| `bb-stories` | `blackbird-user-stories` | Viet user stories va acceptance criteria |
| `bb-brd` | `blackbird-phase-brd` | Chot BRD cho phase cu the |
| `bb-arch` | `blackbird-platform-architecture` | Chot architecture, service boundary, design system alignment |
| `bb-cp` | `blackbird-delivery-control` | Break checkpoint, dua len dashboard, quan ly dependency |
| `bb-improve` | `blackbird-improvement-loop` | Phan tich release, retro, de xuat cai tien |
| `bb-vm` | `blackbird-vm-codex-playbook` | Chon bootstrap repo len GitHub+VM hay tiep tuc dev loop tren repo da onboard |
| `bb-vm-setup` | `blackbird-vm-repo-bootstrap` | Dua project len GitHub, clone sang Linux VM, cau hinh OpenClaw + Codex |
| `bb-vm-dev` | `blackbird-vm-dev-loop` | Tiep tuc phat trien repo da onboard tren Linux VM theo branch/PR/worktree |

Alias than thuoc hon neu khong muon dung prefix `bb`:

- `playbook`
- `core`
- `research`
- `ba`
- `challenge`
- `stories`
- `brd`
- `arch`
- `cp`
- `improve`
- `vm-playbook`
- `vm-setup`
- `vm-dev`

## 3. Cach goi trong chat

Co 3 cach don gian:

1. Goi bang alias ngan.
2. Noi ro muc tieu.
3. Ghep 2-3 skill neu bai toan co nhieu giai doan.

Vi du:

- `Dung bb-core de setup workflow cho app moi nay`
- `Dung bb-playbook de route initiative nay`
- `Dung bb-research de research thi truong cho capability nay`
- `Dung bb-ba + bb-challenge de stress test phase nay`
- `Dung bb-brd + bb-arch de chot phase 2`
- `Dung bb-stories de breakdown feature nay`
- `Dung bb-cp de break checkpoint va dua len dashboard`
- `Dung bb-improve de phan tich release vua roi`
- `Dung bb-vm de route workflow GitHub + VM + Codex cho repo nay`
- `Dung bb-vm-setup de onboard project nay len Linux VM`
- `Dung bb-vm-dev de tiep tuc repo da co tren VM`

## 4. Thu tu dung nhanh theo tinh huong

### A. Khi bat dau app moi

1. `bb-playbook`
2. `bb-core`
3. `bb-research`
4. `bb-ba`
5. `bb-challenge`
6. `bb-brd`
7. `bb-arch`
8. `bb-stories`
9. `bb-cp`

Prompt mau:

`Dung bb-core roi bb-research cho app X. Muc tieu la xem no nen la app runtime rieng hay capability cua platform.`

### B. Khi bat dau phase moi

1. `bb-playbook`
2. `bb-ba`
3. `bb-challenge`
4. `bb-brd`
5. `bb-arch`
6. `bb-stories`
7. `bb-cp`

Prompt mau:

`Dung bb-brd + bb-arch de chot phase nay cho Blackbird, nho split ro platform, shell, app runtime.`

### C. Khi co feature moi trong app da ton tai

1. `bb-playbook`
2. `bb-ba`
3. `bb-challenge`
4. `bb-stories`
5. `bb-arch` neu co boundary impact

Prompt mau:

`Dung bb-ba de frame van de, sau do dung bb-stories de viet backlog item.`

### D. Khi can review mot plan truoc khi code

1. `bb-playbook`
2. `bb-challenge`
3. `bb-brd` neu scope chua ro
4. `bb-arch` neu boundary chua ro

Prompt mau:

`Dung bb-challenge de phan bien ke hoach nay. Toi muon thay hidden assumptions, boundary drift va tripwires.`

### E. Khi can quan ly tien do va dashboard

1. `bb-playbook`
2. `bb-cp`

Prompt mau:

`Dung bb-cp de break phase nay thanh checkpoints theo outcome va dashboard review hang tuan.`

### F. Khi can toi uu hoac cai tien sau release

1. `bb-playbook`
2. `bb-improve`
3. `bb-ba`
4. `bb-challenge`

Prompt mau:

`Dung bb-improve de phan tich release 1.2, lay baseline, root cause va de xuat top 3 cai tien tiep theo.`

### G. Khi can dua repo len Linux VM va chuan hoa GitHub workflow

1. `bb-vm`
2. `bb-vm-setup`

Prompt mau:

`Dung bb-vm-setup de dua repo nay len GitHub, clone sang Linux VM, cau hinh OpenClaw + Codex, va tra ra repo map.`

### H. Khi repo da san sang va can tiep tuc dev tren VM

1. `bb-vm`
2. `bb-vm-dev`

Prompt mau:

`Dung bb-vm-dev de tiep tuc repo nay tren Linux VM, tao branch codex/<task>, run task, validate, push, va chuan bi PR.`

## 5. Rule nho nhanh

Neu ban bi phan van dung skill nao, nho theo quy tac:

- chua ro co nen lam hay khong: `bb-research`
- chua ro dung skill nao truoc: `bb-playbook`
- da thay van de nhung chua frame duoc: `bb-ba`
- da co plan nhung so sai: `bb-challenge`
- da chot huong va can phase contract: `bb-brd`
- da can boundary va shell alignment: `bb-arch`
- da can backlog item de build: `bb-stories`
- da can control delivery: `bb-cp`
- da ship roi va can hoc lai: `bb-improve`
- can route workflow GitHub + VM + Codex: `bb-vm`
- can onboard repo len VM: `bb-vm-setup`
- can daily dev loop tren repo da onboard: `bb-vm-dev`
- can full process: `bb-core`
- can entrypoint dieu phoi toan bo: `bb-playbook`


## 6. Luu y quan trong

1. `bb-arch` luon phai align voi `docs/MASTER.md`.
2. `bb-stories` khong duoc viet truoc `bb-ba` neu van de chua ro.
3. `bb-cp` khong thay the BRD hay architecture doc.
4. `bb-improve` khong duoc dua ra de xuat khi chua co baseline hoac evidence.
5. Neu co conflict giua docs va instinct, uu tien boundary `platform / shared shell / app runtime`.

# Blackbird Playbook

Doc truoc:

- `/Users/nguyenquocthong/project/blackbirdzzzz.art/docs/MASTER.md`
- `/Users/nguyenquocthong/project/blackbirdzzzz.art/docs/skill-system/BLACKBIRD_PLATFORM_PRODUCT_LIFECYCLE.md`
- `/Users/nguyenquocthong/project/blackbirdzzzz.art/docs/skill-system/BLACKBIRD_PLAYBOOK.md`
- `/Users/nguyenquocthong/project/blackbirdzzzz.art/docs/skill-system/QUICKSTART_ALIASES.md`

Vai tro:

- Day la top-level router cho Blackbird.
- No chon orchestrator dung, khong thay the skill con va khong tu viet phase docs.

Workflow:

1. Xep loai bai toan: app moi, pre-live phase/feature, review plan, hay live production iteration.
2. Ket luan boundary so bo: `platform`, `shared shell`, `app runtime`.
3. Kiem tra evidence maturity:
   - chua co production evidence -> route sang `blackbird-platform-lifecycle-core`
   - da co run / release / artifact production that -> route sang `blackbird-production-phase-loop`
4. Chon skill chain toi thieu sau orchestrator do.
5. Liet ke artifacts, stop rules, autonomy level, va next prompt de goi skill tiep theo.

Rule:

- Neu da co production truth, uu tien `blackbird-production-phase-loop` thay vi route generic.
- Neu chua co production evidence, khong route sang production loop.
- Neu scope hoac boundary mo ho, uu tien orchestrator + `blackbird-critical-review` truoc khi goi leaf skill.

Output bat buoc:

- route decision
- orchestrator next
- minimal skill chain
- artifact map
- stop rules
- autonomy note
- next prompt

referencedDocs.raw:
# Blackbird Shared Platform and App Service Boundaries

## 1. Muc tieu tai lieu

Tai lieu nay design lai boundary giua:

- `shared platform layer`
- `app-specific service layer`

theo huong moi duoc chot:

- `Facebook connector state management` va cac `source auth state` khac se duoc quan ly o tang platform
- `crawl`, `normalize`, `analyze`, `report` se nam trong tang dich vu rieng cua tung app
- platform cover cac nghiep vu dung chung nhu account, workspace/team, subscription, billing, app access, va governance

Tai lieu nay supersede nhung phan trong cac doc cu coi `crawl/normalize/analyze/report` la shared core cua platform.

## 2. Ket luan nhanh

Blackbird nen duoc thiet ke nhu:

```text
Blackbird Shared Platform
  -> Identity / Workspace / Team
  -> Billing / Subscription / Entitlement
  -> App Catalog / App Access
  -> Source Connector State / Auth Vault
  -> Shared Governance / Audit

Blackbird Apps
  -> fb-market services
  -> future app services
  -> future app services
```

Noi ngan gon:

- platform so huu `who can use what`
- app so huu `how business work gets done`

## 3. Tai sao doi boundary

Mo hinh cu co uu diem reuse ky thuat rat manh, nhung dang day platform vao vai tro so huu qua nhieu business runtime:

- crawl execution
- normalization
- analysis
- report generation

Phan bien:

- cac nang luc nay nghe co ve generic, nhung thuc te rat de bi app-specific
- logic crawl cua `fb-market` co the khac logic crawl cua app khac
- schema normalize, recipe analysis, cach dong goi report thuong bi keo boi use case
- neu dua het vao platform qua som, platform se phinh to va tro thanh bottleneck cua moi app moi

Voi boundary moi:

- platform se on dinh hon vi giu domain co tinh dung chung cao
- app co tu do tien hoa business logic rieng
- viec mo rong them app moi de hon vi app chi can tich hop vao shared platform thay vi xin thay doi core processing layer

## 4. Nguyen tac kien truc duoc chot

### 4.1. Platform so huu shared business infrastructure

Platform chi nen so huu nhung gi:

- nhieu app can dung chung
- on dinh theo thoi gian
- la root cua governance, commerce, ownership, access

### 4.2. App so huu domain processing runtime

Moi app nen so huu:

- workflow nghiep vu
- crawl strategy
- normalized read model cua rieng app neu can
- analysis pipeline
- report/view model

### 4.3. Source auth state la shared asset

Tai khoan dang nhap, auth session, execution profile cua Facebook hoac source khac la tai san dung chung cua workspace, nen nam o platform.

App khong nen tu giu:

- connector account lifecycle
- auth session lifecycle
- source credential vault

### 4.4. App access va billing phai quy ve workspace

App nao user duoc dung, goi nao da mua, quota nao con lai, thanh vien nao trong team duoc truy cap app nao:

- phai nam o platform
- khong nen moi app tu quan ly lai

## 5. Service Catalog moi

## 5.1. Shared Platform Services

### A. Identity Service

Trach nhiem:

- user account
- login/session
- profile co ban

Core objects:

- User
- Session

### B. Workspace and Team Service

Trach nhiem:

- workspace tenancy
- memberships
- roles
- team management

Core objects:

- Workspace
- Membership
- Role

### C. Commerce and Billing Service

Trach nhiem:

- app catalog
- plans
- subscriptions
- billing account
- invoice/payment record
- usage quota co ban

Core objects:

- AppDefinition
- AppPlan
- WorkspaceSubscription
- BillingAccount
- Invoice
- UsageMeter

### D. App Access and Entitlement Service

Trach nhiem:

- app nao duoc mo cho workspace nao
- member nao duoc dung app nao
- feature/module grant o muc app neu can

Core objects:

- AppAccessGrant
- MemberAppPermission
- AppFeatureGrant

### E. Source Connector Platform

Trach nhiem:

- source platform registry
- connector account lifecycle
- auth/session lifecycle
- execution profile state
- source health metadata

Core objects:

- SourcePlatform
- ConnectorAccount
- AuthSession
- ExecutionProfile
- SourceHealthRecord

### F. Shared Governance Service

Trach nhiem:

- audit
- admin control
- support tooling
- global notifications

Core objects:

- AuditEvent
- AdminAction
- Notification

## 5.2. App-specific Service Layer

Moi app se co service layer rieng.

Vi du `fb-market`:

- crawl service
- normalize service
- analysis service
- report service
- app-specific operation/job tracking
- app-specific artifact/read models

Vi du app khac:

- co the khong crawl Facebook
- co the phan tich source khac
- co the co pipeline khac hoan toan

Khong nen co assumption rang moi app deu dung chung processing runtime.

## 6. High-level Architecture duoc de xuat

```text
Users / Team Members
    -> Shared Platform
       -> Identity
       -> Workspace and Team
       -> Billing and Subscription
       -> App Access and Entitlement
       -> Source Connector State
       -> Governance

App A (fb-market)
    -> su dung shared platform cho:
       - auth
       - workspace context
       - billing/access
       - connector session access
    -> tu so huu:
       - crawl
       - normalize
       - analyze
       - report

App B
    -> su dung shared platform tuong tu
    -> tu so huu runtime rieng
```

## 7. Domain ownership model

## 7.1. Platform-owned domains

Platform nen so huu:

- User
- Workspace
- Membership
- Role
- AppDefinition
- AppPlan
- WorkspaceSubscription
- BillingAccount
- Invoice
- AppAccessGrant
- MemberAppPermission
- SourcePlatform
- ConnectorAccount
- AuthSession
- ExecutionProfile
- AuditEvent
- Notification

## 7.2. App-owned domains

Moi app nen so huu:

- CrawlIntent
- CrawlRun
- RawCapture
- NormalizedDomainRecord
- AnalysisRun
- InsightArtifact
- Report
- SavedView
- Watchlist
- AppSettings

Luu y:

- ten domain cua app co the khac nhau theo use case
- khong ep moi app phai co day du cac object nay

## 7.3. Ownership rules

- `Workspace` la root tenancy cho toan he thong
- `ConnectorAccount` thuoc workspace, khong thuoc app
- `WorkspaceSubscription` thuoc workspace va app definition
- `App runtime data` thuoc workspace + app
- `Billing` va `team management` chi nam o platform

## 8. Integration contract giua platform va app

## 8.1. App context contract

Moi app khi xu ly request nen nhan toi thieu:

```text
actor_id
workspace_id
app_code
member_role
app_access_state
```

## 8.2. App access contract

Truoc khi cho user vao app, platform phai tra loi duoc:

- workspace nay da dang ky app nay chua
- user nay co membership trong workspace khong
- workspace nay con quota/plan hop le khong

Phase 1:

- `workspace app access` chi resolve theo `workspace subscription/access state`
- `MemberAppPermission` la lop gating rieng cho actor-level access, khong nam trong `workspace app access resolution`

## 8.3. Connector access contract

Khi app can su dung Facebook connector:

- app request platform lay `ConnectorAccount` hop le cua workspace
- platform tra metadata va session state can thiet
- app dung context do de chay crawl service cua chinh no

Rang buoc phase 1:

- chi ho tro `1 Facebook ConnectorAccount / workspace`
- `session health` dung enum `healthy | warning | expired | invalid`

Platform khong chay crawl thay app.

App khong tu luu auth source thay platform.

## 8.4. Billing contract

Platform la noi giu:

- app catalog
- plan pricing
- subscription state
- invoice/payment history
- usage/quota records neu can

Phase 1 chi can:

- `WorkspaceSubscription`
- `BillingAccount`

Phase 1 chua can:

- `Invoice`
- `payment history`
- `usage/quota records`

App chi nen:

- bao usage event ve platform
- doc app access state tu platform

## 8.5. Audit contract

Platform audit:

- login
- workspace changes
- subscription/billing actions
- connector account/session changes
- app access grant changes

App audit:

- crawl run
- analysis run
- report generation
- app-specific business actions

Neu can, app co the forward audit summary ve platform de support support/governance.

## 9. Data flow de xuat

## 9.1. Onboarding workspace va app

1. User dang ky account
2. User tao workspace
3. Workspace dang ky app
4. Platform tao subscription/app access
5. Team members duoc moi vao workspace
6. User duoc vao app khi workspace app access hop le, sau do member gating duoc check rieng neu can

## 9.2. Connect Facebook cho workspace

1. Workspace admin vao platform hoac app shell
2. Platform tao `ConnectorAccount`
   Phase 1 chi cho phep `1 Facebook ConnectorAccount / workspace`
3. Platform luu `AuthSession`
4. Platform expose connector state cho app duoc phep dung

## 9.3. App chay business runtime

1. App nhan workspace context tu platform
2. App verify app access va connector availability
3. App tu chay crawl service cua no
4. App tu normalize du lieu theo schema rieng
5. App tu chay analysis/report
6. App ghi app-specific usage va gui usage summary ve platform neu can billing

## 10. Capability model moi

Trong mo hinh moi, `capability catalog` khong nen cover toan bo processing runtime cua moi app.

No nen cover:

- platform-level access va governance
- app-level access units
- source connector rights

Vi du:

- `workspace.manage`
- `team.manage`
- `app.fb-market.access`
- `app.fb-market.admin`
- `connector.facebook.connect`
- `connector.facebook.use`
- `billing.manage`
- `subscription.manage`

Khong nen de platform capability catalog quan ly qua sau:

- topic clustering internals
- report generation logic cua tung app
- crawl strategy chi tiet cua tung app

Nhung cai do nen la capability noi bo cua app neu app can.

## 11. DB design direction

## 11.1. Platform tables

- users
- sessions
- workspaces
- memberships
- roles
- app_definitions
- app_plans
- workspace_subscriptions
- billing_accounts
- invoices
- app_access_grants
- member_app_permissions
- source_platforms
- connector_accounts
- auth_sessions
- execution_profiles
- audit_events
- notifications

## 11.2. App tables

Vi du cho `fb-market`:

- fbm_crawl_intents
- fbm_crawl_runs
- fbm_raw_captures
- fbm_normalized_posts
- fbm_normalized_comments
- fbm_analysis_runs
- fbm_insight_artifacts
- fbm_reports

Y nghia:

- platform schema on dinh va generic
- app schema duoc phep tien hoa theo use case

## 12. Phase 1 design neu theo boundary moi

Neu chot theo boundary moi, Phase 1 khong con la xay full processing core cho Blackbird.

Phase 1 luc nay se cho ra:

- account/login minimum
- workspace/team management
  Vai tro toi thieu: `owner/admin/member/billing_admin`
- app catalog va app access
- subscription/billing skeleton
  Phase 1 chi can `WorkspaceSubscription + BillingAccount`
- Facebook connector account + auth session management
  Phase 1 gioi han `1 Facebook ConnectorAccount / workspace`
- shared audit/governance minimum

Neu can demo business runtime, no se nam trong `Phase 1 cua tung app`, khong nam trong `Phase 1 cua shared platform`.

## 13. De xuat roadmap tach 2 luong

## 13.1. Shared Platform Phase 1

- Identity
- Workspace and Team
- App catalog
- App subscription/access
- Billing skeleton
- Facebook connector state management
- Audit minimum

## 13.2. fb-market App Phase 1

- crawl service
- normalize service
- analyze service
- report service
- app-specific operations
- first user-facing flow

## 14. Phan bien can thiet

## 14.1. Uu diem cua boundary moi

- platform nhe hon va on dinh hon
- app teams co autonomy cao hon
- khong ep moi app theo cung processing runtime
- de doi schema normalize va analysis theo use case

## 14.2. Rui ro cua boundary moi

- co the lap lai ky thuat giua cac apps
- crawl va report logic co the bi copy/paste
- team phai ky luat rat ro de khong de app duplicate auth/session state

## 14.3. Cach giam rui ro

- dung `shared libraries/SDKs`, khong dung shared runtime service qua som
- tach `platform contract` that ro cho connector access, app access, billing hooks
- chi shared nhung gi thuc su on dinh

## 14.4. Khong nen di qua cuc doan nguoc lai

Khong nen vi day processing xuong app ma de:

- moi app tu auth rieng
- moi app tu workspace/team rieng
- moi app tu billing rieng
- moi app tu connector vault rieng

Neu vay Blackbird se thanh mot collection cac san pham roi rac, khong phai platform.

## 15. Kien nghi chot

Neu theo huong ban vua chot, minh de xuat:

- doi ten tu duy tu `shared processing platform` sang `shared business platform`
- platform giu `identity + workspace + team + billing + app access + connector auth state + governance`
- app giu `crawl + normalize + analyze + report`
- app tich hop vao platform qua 3 contract chinh:
  - `workspace/member context`
  - `app access/subscription state`
  - `connector account/session access`

Day la mo hinh can bang tot neu muc tieu cua ban la:

- scale theo so luong app
- giu duoc shared business infrastructure
- khong bien platform thanh bottleneck cua business logic

referencedDocs.raw:
# Blackbird Master Document

## 1. Muc tieu cua file nay

Day la `source of truth` cap cao nhat cho toan bo Blackbird.

Tat ca cac tai lieu khac ve:

- product direction
- platform boundaries
- phase planning
- system architecture
- app integration

deu phai phu hop voi file nay.

Neu co xung dot giua cac tai lieu, uu tien theo thu tu:

1. `docs/MASTER.md`
2. tai lieu phase hien hanh
3. tai lieu tham chieu/lich su

## 2. Blackbird la gi

Blackbird la mot he sinh thai gom:

- `Shared Business Platform`
- nhieu `Apps` hoac `Services` customer-facing

Blackbird khong duoc xem la mot san pham don le.

No la mot nen tang kinh doanh dung chung de nhieu app co the song tren do ma van giu:

- account va login thong nhat
- workspace va team thong nhat
- subscription va billing thong nhat
- app access thong nhat
- source connector state thong nhat
- governance va audit thong nhat

Song song, Blackbird nen co mot `Shared Product Shell` dung chung cho:

- workspace switcher
- app switcher
- account/settings shell
- billing/connectors/team management screens
- design tokens va visual language thong nhat

## 3. Nguyen tac chot cho toan bo san pham

### 3.1. Platform-first ve business, app-first ve runtime

Blackbird dung mo hinh:

- `platform so huu shared business infrastructure`
- `app so huu business processing runtime`

Noi ngan gon:

- platform tra loi `who can use what`
- app tra loi `how work gets done`

### 3.2. Workspace la root cua ownership

Moi tai nguyen dung chung quan trong phai quy ve `Workspace`.

Vi du:

- memberships
- subscriptions
- app access
- billing account
- connector accounts
- auth sessions
- audit events

Khong app nao duoc phep tao tenant model rieng thay cho workspace.

### 3.3. Shared platform chi giu domain co tinh on dinh cao

Platform chi nen giu nhung gi:

- duoc nhieu app dung chung
- khong bi keo boi use case rieng cua mot app
- la nen tang cho governance, commerce va ownership

### 3.4. App co quyen tu chu runtime

Moi app duoc phep tu so huu:

- workflow nghiep vu
- crawl strategy
- normalize schema
- analysis pipeline
- report/read model

Platform khong nen ep moi app theo cung processing runtime.

### 3.5. Source auth state la shared asset

Tai khoan ket noi voi Facebook hoac nen tang khac la tai san cua workspace, nen phai duoc quan ly o platform.

App khong duoc tu giu:

- connector lifecycle
- auth session lifecycle
- source credential vault

### 3.6. App access va billing phai thong nhat o platform

App nao duoc dung, goi nao da mua, thanh vien nao duoc vao app nao, va thong tin billing cua workspace:

- phai nam o platform
- khong duoc moi app quan ly lai

### 3.7. Shared Product Shell dung chung cho he sinh thai

Blackbird nen co mot lop UI foundation dung chung cho:

- design tokens
- theme system
- shared layout shell
- navigation va switchers
- generic forms/tables/dialogs/status patterns

Lop nay khong thay the app UI.

No chi giai quyet:

- visual language
- shell consistency
- common admin/settings UX

## 4. Boundary chinh thuc

## 4.1. Shared Business Platform so huu

- Identity
- Workspace and Team
- App Catalog
- Subscription and Billing
- App Access and Entitlement
- Source Connector State
- Shared Governance and Audit

## 4.2. Apps so huu

- app-specific crawl
- app-specific normalize
- app-specific analysis
- app-specific reports
- app-specific operations/jobs
- app-specific read models
- app-specific saved views/templates/workflows

## 4.3. Shared Product Shell so huu

- design tokens
- theme provider
- shared app shell
- workspace/app switchers
- generic forms/tables/dialogs/status components
- settings page patterns

## 4.4. Khong duoc lam

Khong duoc de:

- app tu auth rieng
- app tu workspace/team rieng
- app tu billing rieng
- app tu auth vault rieng

Neu can shared processing sau nay, uu tien:

- shared SDK
- shared library

truoc khi tao shared runtime service moi.

Khong nen ep Shared Product Shell so huu:

- domain widgets qua dac thu
- report layouts qua rieng cua tung app
- business runtime cua app

## 5. Shared Platform Service Catalog

### A. Identity Service

So huu:

- User
- Session

### B. Workspace and Team Service

So huu:

- Workspace
- Membership
- Role

### C. App Catalog Service

So huu:

- AppDefinition
- AppPlan

### D. Subscription and Billing Service

So huu:

- WorkspaceSubscription
- BillingAccount
- Invoice
- UsageMeter

### E. App Access and Entitlement Service

So huu:

- AppAccessGrant
- MemberAppPermission
- AppFeatureGrant

### F. Source Connector Platform

So huu:

- SourcePlatform
- ConnectorAccount
- AuthSession
- ExecutionProfile
- SourceHealthRecord

### G. Governance Service

So huu:

- AuditEvent
- AdminAction
- Notification

## 6. App Integration Contracts

Moi app khi tich hop vao Blackbird phai dung 3 contract chinh:

### 6.1. Workspace and member context contract

App phai nhan duoc:

- actor_id
- workspace_id
- membership role
- app_code

### 6.2. App access contract

Platform phai tra loi duoc:

- workspace nay co duoc dung app nay khong
- subscription/app access con hieu luc khong
- phase 1 resolve o muc workspace, khong tron vao `MemberAppPermission`

`MemberAppPermission` co the duoc query o lop gating rieng khi app can chan/mo actor cu the.

### 6.3. Connector state contract

Platform phai tra duoc:

- workspace co connector account nao
  Phase 1 gioi han `1 Facebook ConnectorAccount / workspace`
- session health cua connector ra sao
  Phase 1 dung enum `healthy | warning | expired | invalid`
- metadata nao app co the su dung de chay runtime cua no

App chi duoc `use connector state`.

App khong duoc `own connector state`.

## 7. Cach ra quyet dinh khi them domain moi

Neu mot domain moi xuat hien, dung 5 cau hoi sau:

1. Nhieu app co can dung chung no khong?
2. No co tinh on dinh cao hay se bi keo boi use case rieng?
3. No co lien quan den ownership, access, billing, governance khong?
4. Neu de trong app, co gay duplicate nguy hiem khong?
5. Neu de trong platform, co bien platform thanh bottleneck khong?

Quy tac:

- neu nghieng ve governance/business infrastructure -> de o platform
- neu nghieng ve runtime/use-case processing -> de o app

## 8. Nguyên tắc phase planning

Moi phase phai ghi ro:

- phase nay xay `platform` hay `app`
- actor chinh la ai
- tai nguyen nao la source of truth
- out of scope la gi

Khong duoc viet phase doc theo cach tron boundary giua:

- shared platform
- app-specific runtime

## 9. Shared Platform Phase 1 duoc chot

Shared Platform Phase 1 chi tap trung vao:

- account/login minimum
- workspace/team minimum, gom `owner/admin/member/billing_admin`
- app catalog
- subscription/app access skeleton
  Phase 1 chi can `WorkspaceSubscription + BillingAccount`, khong can `Invoice`
  `workspace app access` resolve theo `workspace subscription/access state`
- billing account skeleton
- Facebook connector account + auth session management
  Phase 1 gioi han `1 Facebook ConnectorAccount / workspace`
- shared governance/audit minimum

Shared Platform Phase 1 khong bao gom:

- crawl runtime
- normalize runtime
- analysis runtime
- report runtime

Nhung nang luc do thuoc `Phase 1 cua tung app`.

## 10. App Phase 1 guideline

Moi app Phase 1 co the tu xay:

- crawl service
- normalize service
- analysis service
- report service

nhung bat buoc phai tich hop voi platform cho:

- auth
- workspace context
- app access
- connector state

## 11. Tai lieu nen ton tai sau file master

Moi app/phase sau nay nen co:

- `docs/phases/{phase}/business-analysis.md`
- `docs/phases/{phase}/phase-brd.md`
- `docs/phases/{phase}/user-stories.md`
- `docs/phases/{phase}/solution-architecture.md`

Moi doc phase phai mo dau bang cach tham chieu file master nay.

Tai lieu ho tro cap du an nen co:

- [ENGINEERING_RULES.md](/Users/nguyenquocthong/project/blackbirdzzzz.art/docs/ENGINEERING_RULES.md)
- [DEPLOYMENT_AND_INFRASTRUCTURE.md](/Users/nguyenquocthong/project/blackbirdzzzz.art/docs/DEPLOYMENT_AND_INFRASTRUCTURE.md)

referencedDocs.raw:
# Blackbird Platform Product Lifecycle Skill System

## 1. Muc tieu

Tai lieu nay dinh nghia bo guideline dang skill de moi app moi, moi phase moi, va moi quyet dinh san pham deu align voi `blackbirdzzzz.art` nhu mot platform, khong phai mot tap hop standalone app.

No dung de:

- thong nhat cach team research, phan tich, phan bien, chot scope, chot architecture, theo doi delivery, va de xuat cai tien
- dam bao moi artifact deu noi mach voi `Shared Business Platform`, `Shared Product Shell`, va `App Runtime`
- bien tri thuc noi bo thanh `briefing packet` co the reuse cho con nguoi va agent

## 2. Nguyen tac nen tang khong duoc vi pham

Tat ca skill trong he nay deu phai obey cac nguyen tac sau:

1. Blackbird la platform ecosystem, khong phai mot app don le.
2. Platform-first ve business infrastructure, app-first ve business runtime.
3. Workspace la root cua ownership.
4. Shared Product Shell la UI foundation dung chung cho toan he sinh thai.
5. App moi phai integrate vao platform contracts, khong tu tao auth, workspace, billing, entitlement, connector lifecycle rieng.
6. Reuse engineering patterns tu app reference duoc phep, nhung khong duoc copy app-specific business boundaries len platform.
7. Build sau khi da co evidence. Discovery va BA phai den truoc implementation.
8. Moi artifact phai tra loi ro capability nay nam o `platform`, `shared shell`, hay `app runtime`.
9. Moi phase phai co measurable exit criteria.
10. Moi quyet dinh lon phai co path tiep theo cho iteration, khong chot tai lieu de roi do.

## 3. 3 lop phan loai bat buoc

Moi skill, moi tai lieu, moi backlog item deu phai tag ro vao 1 trong 3 lop sau:

- `Shared Business Platform`
- `Shared Product Shell`
- `App Runtime`

Neu mot item cham vao nhieu lop, phai tach:

- business ownership
- integration contract
- UI shell impact
- runtime implementation impact

## 4. Artifact chain mac dinh

Moi initiative nen di theo artifact chain sau:

1. `Market Research`
2. `BA Problem Brief`
3. `Critical Review`
4. `Phase BRD`
5. `Platform Architecture + Design Alignment`
6. `User Stories`
7. `Checkpoint Dashboard Plan`
8. `Implementation`
9. `Improvement Loop`

Artifact sau phai reference artifact truoc. Khong duoc jump tu idea sang code ma khong co chain toi thieu tu `research -> BA -> phase BRD -> architecture -> stories`.

Khi capability da ship va da co production evidence that, chain nay duoc vao qua `blackbird-production-phase-loop`.
Skill do se so huu `observe -> checkpoint -> route -> re-validation`, sau do chi handoff vao artifact chain generic neu route la `new-phase`.

## 5. Ky luat chung cho moi skill

Moi skill trong bo nay phai produce 5 nhom thong tin:

1. `Decision`
2. `Evidence`
3. `Boundary`
4. `Delivery`
5. `Metrics`

Noi cu the:

- `Decision`: dang quyet cai gi, khong phai dang viet tai lieu cho vui
- `Evidence`: du lieu, interview, benchmark, analytics, policy, hoac assumption can test
- `Boundary`: phan nao vao platform, shell, app runtime
- `Delivery`: artifact tiep theo la gi, ai su dung, dependency nao can co
- `Metrics`: se do thanh cong bang cach nao

## 6. Quality gates theo tung giai doan

### 6.1. Market Research gate

Chi duoc qua gate neu da co:

- user/problem segment ro rang
- alternatives/competitors/substitutes duoc map
- evidence table ro nguon
- top assumptions va unknowns duoc rank
- nhan dinh so bo capability do co xu huong vao platform hay app

### 6.2. BA gate

Chi duoc qua gate neu da co:

- problem statement, desired outcome, va scope boundary
- stakeholder map
- current state va future state
- requirement split theo 3 lop: platform, shell, app runtime
- constraints, dependencies, non-goals

### 6.3. Critical Review gate

Chi duoc qua gate neu da co:

- top risks ranked by impact x probability
- hidden assumptions
- strongest case against
- tripwires/canh bao som
- recommendation: proceed, proceed with modifications, pause, hoac rethink

### 6.4. Phase BRD gate

Chi duoc qua gate neu da co:

- phase objective
- in-scope/out-of-scope
- KPI/KR cho phase
- business rules da chot
- exit criteria va release readiness rules

### 6.5. Architecture + Design gate

Chi duoc qua gate neu da co:

- service boundary ro
- integration contract voi platform
- ownership cua data va workflows
- shared shell/design token impact
- operability, security, reliability, cost, observability considerations

### 6.6. User Story gate

Chi duoc qua gate neu da co:

- actor, goal, reason ro rang
- acceptance criteria testable
- layer tag: platform/shell/app
- dependencies va evidence links
- story du nho de delivery

### 6.7. Delivery Control gate

Chi duoc qua gate neu da co:

- checkpoints co owner, due window, dependency
- trang thai dashboard duoc dinh nghia ro
- artifacts linked vao checkpoint
- risk va blocker route ro
- progress duoc visual hoa theo gia tri, khong chi theo task count

### 6.8. Improvement gate

Chi duoc qua gate neu da co:

- baseline truoc thay doi
- ket qua sau thay doi
- phan tich business + user + engineering metrics
- de xuat tiep theo co priority
- quyet dinh giu, sua, bo, hay mo rong

## 7. Metrics framework chung

Khong duoc quan ly phase chi bang velocity.

Moi san pham/phase nen co toi thieu 3 tang metrics:

- `Business`: activation, revenue, retention, entitlement adoption, workspace expansion
- `User`: task success, time-to-value, error rate, satisfaction proxy, support pain points
- `Engineering`: DORA-style throughput/instability, reliability, incident recovery, observability

Neu la UI hoac experience-level capability, them `HEART`-style nhom metrics:

- Happiness
- Engagement
- Adoption
- Retention
- Task success

## 8. Cau hoi boundary bat buoc

Moi skill phai tra loi 8 cau hoi sau:

1. Van de nay co that su la domain dung chung cua nhieu app khong?
2. Gia tri do nam o `who can use what` hay `how work gets done`?
3. Ownership root co quay ve workspace khong?
4. Co anh huong toi billing, entitlement, connector state, governance khong?
5. Co can shared shell pattern hay chi la domain widget cua app?
6. Capability nay co the song nhu app runtime rieng duoc khong?
7. Neu dua len platform, platform co bi keo theo app-specific runtime khong?
8. Metrics nao chung minh quyet dinh nay dung?

## 9. Bo skill duoc de xuat

### A. `blackbird-playbook`

Entry point cho nguoi dung muon he thong tu de xuat va dieu phoi cac skill con theo dung lifecycle.

### B. `blackbird-platform-lifecycle-core`

Dieu phoi toan bo chain. Dung khi setup initiative moi, app moi, phase moi.

### C. `blackbird-market-research`

Dung cho market research, competitor scan, substitute scan, user/problem discovery.

### D. `blackbird-business-analysis`

Dung cho BA problem framing, stakeholder/constraint mapping, requirement split.

### E. `blackbird-critical-review`

Dung cho pre-mortem, devil's advocate, assumption mapping, stress test.

### F. `blackbird-user-stories`

Dung cho user story va acceptance criteria theo layer.

### G. `blackbird-phase-brd`

Dung de chot BRD cho mot phase cu the.

### H. `blackbird-platform-architecture`

Dung de chot service boundary, integration contract, va design system alignment.

### I. `blackbird-delivery-control`

Dung de break checkpoint, dua len dashboard, va control dependency/risk.

### J. `blackbird-improvement-loop`

Dung de phan tich sau release, sau phase, hoac trong live ops de de xuat cai tien.

### K. `blackbird-production-phase-loop`

Dung cho live production iteration khi da co run / release / artifact production that.
Skill nay la specialization cua lifecycle cho `observe -> checkpoint -> route -> re-validation`.
No khong thay `blackbird-platform-lifecycle-core`; no chi handoff vao core khi can phase moi.

## 10. Thu tu dung skill theo lifecycle

### 10.1. App moi

1. `blackbird-platform-lifecycle-core`
2. `blackbird-market-research`
3. `blackbird-business-analysis`
4. `blackbird-critical-review`
5. `blackbird-phase-brd`
6. `blackbird-platform-architecture`
7. `blackbird-user-stories`
8. `blackbird-delivery-control`
9. `blackbird-improvement-loop`

### 10.2. Feature moi trong app da co

1. `blackbird-business-analysis`
2. `blackbird-critical-review`
3. `blackbird-phase-brd`
4. `blackbird-platform-architecture` neu co tac dong boundary/shell
5. `blackbird-user-stories`
6. `blackbird-delivery-control`
7. `blackbird-improvement-loop`

### 10.3. Cai tien live product

1. `blackbird-production-phase-loop`
2. `blackbird-improvement-loop`
3. `blackbird-critical-review`
4. Route theo checkpoint:
   - `evidence-weak` -> quay lai observation / instrumentation
   - `contained-fix` -> `blackbird-delivery-control` -> implementation
   - `new-phase` -> `blackbird-platform-lifecycle-core` -> `blackbird-business-analysis` -> `blackbird-phase-brd` -> `blackbird-user-stories`

## 11. Artifact schema chung

Moi artifact nen co front matter hoac section metadata toi thieu:

```text
Title:
Owner:
Date:
Related app:
Lifecycle stage:
Primary layer: platform | shell | app
Related layers:
Upstream artifacts:
Downstream artifacts:
Decision status: draft | review | locked
```

## 12. Quy tac tai lieu va dashboard

1. Tai lieu phai version-controlled trong repo.
2. Moi phase phai co doc source of truth rieng.
3. Dashboard khong thay the tai lieu, dashboard chi la bo mat control.
4. Checkpoint nao khong link toi artifact va output thi la checkpoint yeu.
5. Status khong duoc chi la `todo/doing/done`; phai co risk, dependency, va evidence update.

## 13. Tich hop voi docs hien co cua Blackbird

Tat ca skill trong bo nay phai align voi:

- [MASTER](/Users/nguyenquocthong/project/blackbirdzzzz.art/docs/MASTER.md)
- [Platform And Design Foundation](/Users/nguyenquocthong/project/blackbirdzzzz.art/docs/blackbird-platform-and-design-foundation.md)
- [Shared Platform App Boundaries](/Users/nguyenquocthong/project/blackbirdzzzz.art/docs/blackbird-shared-platform-app-boundaries.md)
- [Dashboard Integration Rules](/Users/nguyenquocthong/project/blackbirdzzzz.art/docs/dashboard-coordinate-blackbird-integration-rules.md)

Neu conflict, thu tu uu tien:

1. `docs/MASTER.md`
2. tai lieu phase dang active
3. tai lieu nay
4. skill-specific guidance

## 14. Nguon tham khao ben ngoai

Nguon research va adaptation nam tai:

- [External Research Notes](/Users/nguyenquocthong/project/blackbirdzzzz.art/docs/skill-system/EXTERNAL_RESEARCH_NOTES.md)
- [Blackbird Playbook](/Users/nguyenquocthong/project/blackbirdzzzz.art/docs/skill-system/BLACKBIRD_PLAYBOOK.md)

---
name: blackbird-production-phase-loop
description: >
  Use when the user asks to "bb-prod-loop", "production phase loop",
  "vong lap phat trien production", "production improvement loop",
  "check production run roi phat trien tiep", "loop product tu production",
  or wants a repeatable loop to inspect real production runs, pause at the
  analysis checkpoint for direction, then drive the next phase from docs,
  checkpoints, implementation, deploy, and re-validation.
---


# Blackbird Production Phase Loop

Doc truoc:

- `/Users/nguyenquocthong/project/blackbirdzzzz.art/docs/MASTER.md`
- `/Users/nguyenquocthong/project/blackbirdzzzz.art/docs/blackbird-shared-platform-app-boundaries.md`
- `/Users/nguyenquocthong/project/blackbirdzzzz.art/docs/skill-system/BLACKBIRD_PLATFORM_PRODUCT_LIFECYCLE.md`
- reference: `references/production-phase-loop.md`

Vai tro:

- Day la live-production orchestrator cho Blackbird.
- No chi so huu phan dac thu cua vong lap production: `observe -> checkpoint -> route -> re-validate`.
- No khong thay the artifact chain generic; neu can phase moi thi handoff sang `blackbird-platform-lifecycle-core`.

Workflow:

1. Thu thap production evidence va tao `run packet` bang:
   - `ssh-openclaw-vm` neu can vao VM / server / runtime
   - `blackbird-improvement-loop` de tong hop baseline, delta, va gap
   - `product-analyst` neu can metrics analysis sau hon
2. Chay `blackbird-critical-review` tren checkpoint de tra loi 3 cau hoi:
   - phase hien tai co dung expect khong
   - user problem da duoc giai quyet chua
   - neu chua thi thieu o dau va vi sao
3. Dung lai tai checkpoint phan tich, bao cao cho user, tru khi autonomy policy cho phep di tiep voi `contained-fix`.
4. Chon 1 trong 3 duong:
   - `Path A - Evidence weak`: bo sung instrumentation, lay them artifact, roi quay lai observation
   - `Path B - Contained fix`: scope van nam trong artifact da khoa -> route sang `blackbird-delivery-control` roi implementation
   - `Path C - New phase`: co doi scope / boundary / contract -> handoff sang `blackbird-platform-lifecycle-core`
5. Sau khi giao hang, deploy production that, trigger re-validation, tong hop ket qua, roi quay lai buoc 1.

Rule:

- Khong duoc bo qua evidence tu production that.
- Critique mac dinh la `blackbird-critical-review`, khong dung critique generic lam route chinh.
- Khong duoc mo phase moi neu user chua chot huong hoac policy chua cho phep.
- Chi dung toi thieu skill chain can thiet.
- Fast path `contained-fix` chi hop le khi khong doi boundary, khong doi phase contract, va confidence du cao.

Output bat buoc:

- run packet
- checkpoint verdict
- route decision (`evidence-weak` / `contained-fix` / `new-phase`)
- phase or patch package
- deploy and re-validation summary
